name: guru-create-task-workspace
description: Create or exactly reuse a reviewed issue workspace and Trellis task through a semantic gate, scoped confirmation, deterministic execution, and four typed exits.

entry_preconditions.evidence: installed extension manifest, dispatcher, active package inventory and three declared runtime commands
entry_preconditions.binding: complete compatible Guru Team preset runtime
entry_preconditions.freshness: validated by run-skill-command before every runtime command

entry_preconditions.binding: selected base, remote and decision/local/remote HEAD
same base, target, duplicate and current repository facts
entry_preconditions.freshness: checker-passed canonical bytes and snapshot digest remain current

entry_preconditions.binding: final target, disposition, source action and scope decisions
entry_preconditions.freshness: target and authority bytes remain current

entry_preconditions.binding: exact reviewed issue or draft title/body
entry_preconditions.freshness: fixed scope and scan digest remain current
facts digest and prerequisite linkage remain current

entry_preconditions.evidence: one final open issue or reviewed side-effect-free draft projected by clarification and readiness
entry_preconditions.binding: workspace Skill does not choose duplicates, retarget, reopen, or create follow-up scope
entry_preconditions.freshness: live issue or reviewed draft is reread immediately before mutation

entry_preconditions.evidence: AI-reviewed semantic names, existing-object disposition, non-empty assignee and source evidence
entry_preconditions.binding: branch/workspace/task identity and fixed assignee resolution order
entry_preconditions.freshness: object and GitHub actor facts are rechecked before execution

entry_preconditions.evidence: AI Review Gate plus exactly one invocation-specific confirmation
entry_preconditions.freshness: confirmation binds the current reviewable plan digest

entry_preconditions.evidence: canonical plan, prerequisite bytes, target, base, object and confirmation digests
entry_preconditions.freshness: every digest and live fact is recomputed before typed exit

validators.objective_scope: closed schema, five prerequisite identities and digests, target/scope/base projection, confirmation and AI Gate binding, canonical plan digest, stdout-only zero-write postcondition

current base/target/prerequisite/plan confirmation facts, exact issue-only or workspace/task-only mutations, object reuse identity, explicit assignee and four task-local artifacts without developer identity
published result schema, live issue binding or branch/worktree/task identity, exact artifact bytes/digests/trackability, ignored runtime, workspace boundary, no-developer and typed consumer

external_exits.evidence: exact workspace, branch, active task, four task-local artifacts and ignored runtime mappings passed result checking
a reviewed issue was created or a prerequisite/live authority fact requires complete Intake refresh
the user cancelled the exact plan before mutation and the zero-write snapshot passed
semantic conflict, unresolved assignee, object identity conflict or deterministic execution/check failure

reentry.identity: five prerequisite result digests, final target/disposition, scope, base, naming, assignee, side-effect scope, confirmation and plan digest
reentry.freshness: created issue requires complete Intake replay; workspace recovery only reuses identity-exact live objects and byte-identical artifacts
